title: KwamiPlus
description: This add-on for Nastia's Miracle Stones breathes new life into your magical companions! Instead of adding new Kwamis, it enhances the existing ones by giving them dynamic, interactive personalities. Your Kwamis will now chat with you.
body:
✨ Enhanced Kwamis (An Add-on for Nastia's Miracle Stones) ✨
Requires the base mod: Nastia's Miracle Stones

Are you tired of your Kwamis just sitting in your inventory silently? Do you wish your magical companions actually felt like, well, companions?

Enhanced Kwamis is a dedicated add-on for Nastia's Miracle Stones that breathes completely new life into your Miraculous Minecraft experience! Please note: This add-on does not add new Kwamis to the game. Instead, it takes the amazing Kwamis already in the base mod and makes them better, more interactive, and truly alive!

🐾 Features
🗣️ They Are Alive! (Dynamic Personalities)
Your Kwamis are no longer just quiet magical entities—they have a voice! Interact and chat with your Kwamis, and they will actually respond to you. Every single Kwami has been updated with their own unique personality and dialogue. Whether it's Tikki giving you words of encouragement, or Plagg complaining about a lack of Camembert cheese, your bond with your Kwami has never felt more real.

🌲 Survival Implications
Having a Kwami is a big responsibility, and now it impacts your everyday Minecraft survival! Your Kwamis will react to the world around them. They offer unique interactions that blend seamlessly into your vanilla survival experience, providing helpful guidance, reacting to your actions (like how you treat villagers or build your base!), and making your solo adventures feel a lot less lonely.

🌍 Multiplayer Magic
Playing on a server with friends? The Enhanced Kwamis add-on brings fantastic multiplayer implications! Show off your lively companions to other players, experience how your Kwamis react when other Miraculous holders are nearby, and immerse yourselves in a truly interactive Miraculous roleplay environment.

⚙️ Getting Started
Simply install Nastia's Miracle Stones, drop this add-on into your mods folder, and prepare to meet your Kwamis like never before!
